subject: refactor(triggers): reorder definitions to match priority sequence
body:
Trigger definitions now appear in the same order as the start/go
priority sequence: rev → aud → doc → tap → cln → perf → sec → dbg → imp.
start/go moved to the end since it's a meta-trigger that references the others.

Tags: documentation, triggers, dx
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: developer-experience
Semver: patch
title: reorder definitions to match priority sequence
